scripts.dev:web: bun run build:motion-gpu && bun run --cwd apps/web dev
scripts.build: bun run build:motion-gpu && bun run build:web
scripts.preview: bun run build:motion-gpu && bun run --cwd apps/web preview
scripts.deploy:web: bun run build:motion-gpu && bun run --cwd apps/web deploy
scripts.check: bun run build:motion-gpu && bun run check:motion-gpu && bun run check:web
scripts.test: bun run build:motion-gpu && bun run test:motion-gpu
scripts.lint: bun run lint:motion-gpu && bun run lint:web
scripts.format: bun run --cwd apps/web format && bun run --cwd packages/motion-gpu format
